name: comparison_sort_lower_bound
subject: comparison_sort
theorem_src: theorem comparison_sort_lower_bound : forall n h : Nat, 2 ^ h >= Nat.factorial n -> h >= Nat.log 2 (Nat.factorial n)

name: additive_identity
subject: nat_add
theorem_src: theorem additive_identity : forall n : Nat, n + 0 = n

name: mul_comm_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_comm_nat : forall a b : Nat, a * b = b * a

name: add_comm_nat
subject: nat_add
theorem_src: theorem add_comm_nat : forall a b : Nat, a + b = b + a

name: add_assoc_nat
subject: nat_add
theorem_src: theorem add_assoc_nat : forall a b c : Nat, a + b + c = a + (b + c)

name: zero_add_nat
subject: nat_add
theorem_src: theorem zero_add_nat : forall n : Nat, 0 + n = n

name: mul_assoc_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_assoc_nat : forall a b c : Nat, a * b * c = a * (b * c)

name: mul_one_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_one_nat : forall n : Nat, n * 1 = n

name: one_mul_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem one_mul_nat : forall n : Nat, 1 * n = n

name: mul_zero_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_zero_nat : forall n : Nat, n * 0 = 0

name: zero_mul_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem zero_mul_nat : forall n : Nat, 0 * n = 0

name: left_distrib_nat
subject: nat_arith
theorem_src: theorem left_distrib_nat : forall a b c : Nat, a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c

name: right_distrib_nat
subject: nat_arith
theorem_src: theorem right_distrib_nat : forall a b c : Nat, (a + b) * c = a * c + b * c

name: two_mul_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem two_mul_nat : forall n : Nat, 2 * n = n + n

name: pow_zero_nat
subject: nat_pow
theorem_src: theorem pow_zero_nat : forall a : Nat, a ^ 0 = 1

name: pow_succ_nat
subject: nat_pow
theorem_src: theorem pow_succ_nat : forall a n : Nat, a ^ (n + 1) = a ^ n * a

name: add_comm_int
subject: int_add
theorem_src: theorem add_comm_int : forall a b : Int, a + b = b + a

name: mul_comm_int
subject: int_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_comm_int : forall a b : Int, a * b = b * a

name: neg_neg_int
subject: int_neg
theorem_src: theorem neg_neg_int : forall a : Int, -(-a) = a

name: add_left_neg_int
subject: int_add
theorem_src: theorem add_left_neg_int : forall a : Int, -a + a = 0

name: nat_le_refl
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_le_refl : forall n : Nat, n <= n

name: nat_zero_le
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_zero_le : forall n : Nat, 0 <= n

name: nat_lt_succ_self
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_lt_succ_self : forall n : Nat, n < n + 1

name: nat_le_add_right
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_le_add_right : forall a b : Nat, a <= a + b

name: nat_succ_pos
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_succ_pos : forall n : Nat, 0 < n + 1

name: nat_add_le_add_left
subject: nat_order
theorem_src: theorem nat_add_le_add_left : forall a b c : Nat, b <= c -> a + b <= a + c

name: two_mul_mod_two
subject: nat_parity
theorem_src: theorem two_mul_mod_two : forall n : Nat, (2 * n) % 2 = 0

name: add_self_mod_two
subject: nat_parity
theorem_src: theorem add_self_mod_two : forall n : Nat, (n + n) % 2 = 0

name: mod_two_lt
subject: nat_parity
theorem_src: theorem mod_two_lt : forall n : Nat, n % 2 < 2

name: two_pow_pos
subject: exponential
theorem_src: theorem two_pow_pos : forall n : Nat, 0 < 2 ^ n

name: factorial_pos
subject: factorial
theorem_src: theorem factorial_pos : forall n : Nat, 0 < Nat.factorial n

name: nat_log_le_self
subject: logarithm
theorem_src: theorem nat_log_le_self : forall n : Nat, Nat.log 2 n <= n

name: self_le_two_pow
subject: exponential
theorem_src: theorem self_le_two_pow : forall n : Nat, n < 2 ^ n

name: exists_succ
subject: nat_succ
theorem_src: theorem exists_succ : forall n : Nat, exists m : Nat, m = n + 1
